name: Automotive Cybersecurity Standards MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems for automotive cybersecurity standards and regulations. Provides AI agents access to automotive security frameworks including UN R155/R156 regulations, ISO/SAE 21434, TISAX, AUTOSAR security guidelines, and Chinese GB/T standards. Enables compliance research and gap analysis for automotive security programs.
use_cases: Querying automotive cybersecurity regulations (R155/R156) for compliance agents
Researching ISO 21434 requirements for vehicle cybersecurity management systems
TISAX assessment guidance from automotive supplier compliance agents
Analyzing AUTOSAR security guidelines for embedded automotive systems development
not_for: Legal advice — reference tool, not regulatory counsel
Non-automotive industries — specialized for automotive OEM/supplier context
best_when: An automotive OEM or supplier's security/compliance team wants AI agents to query and apply automotive cybersecurity standards — UN regulations, ISO 21434, TISAX — during security assessments and compliance programs.
avoid_when: You work in non-automotive sectors. Automotive cybersecurity standards are highly domain-specific. Always complement with certified regulatory consultants for formal compliance programs.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses publicly available standards references.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — open source standards reference tool
pricing.notes: Free open source from Ansvar Systems.

performance.rate_limits: No external rate limits — local/static reference data

known_agent_gotchas: Standards text may be summarized/interpreted — always verify against official UN/ISO/TISAX publications for formal compliance
R155/R156 are UN ECE regulations — check applicability by region (EU, Korea, Japan, CN have different adoption timelines)
ISO 21434 and TISAX are paid standards — this server provides guidance, not the full standard text
Ansvar Systems specializes in compliance tooling — quality automotive security reference implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public standards reference data — non-sensitive. No auth required. Always supplement AI compliance analysis with certified regulatory consultants for formal programs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Standards reference data. No auth. Non-sensitive. Use as starting point, not definitive compliance authority.
